decks.name: Julien Green
decks.description: Memory, identity and the inner life.

cards.title: The Hidden Room
cards.question: Which room from your past can you still picture clearly?
cards.quote: A house is a map of remembered lives.
cards.author: Julien Green

cards.title: A Private Symbol
cards.question: What symbol has acquired a personal meaning for you?
cards.author: John Dee

cards.title: Midway
cards.question: Describe a moment when you knew your direction had to change.
cards.quote: The path becomes visible by walking.
cards.author: Dante Alighieri

cards.title: All the World's a Stage
cards.question: Which role do you play most often, and which role do you avoid?
cards.author: William Shakespeare

cards.title: First Anthem
cards.question: Which song first made you feel part of a crowd?
cards.quote: A chorus turns strangers into a room.
cards.author: DJ WHO

cards.title: Stone and Weather
cards.question: Which place feels different to you when it rains?
cards.author: Chanson Archive

cards.title: The Kitchen Table
cards.question: What story was repeatedly told at your family table?
cards.quote: A family story changes slightly with every telling.
cards.author: Chanson Archive

cards.title: Colour of Today
cards.question: Choose a colour for today. Where do you feel it in your body?
cards.author: Chanson Archive
